overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a walk along a futuristic urban street into a concrete underpass tunnel. The scene transitions from bright daylight with passing vehicles to a dimly lit interior with fluorescent lighting, featuring high-fidelity cyberpunk aesthetics with concrete architecture and distinctive billboards.

events.description: futuristic sports car drives past on the right side of the road
dark-colored truck drives past on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk toward the tunnel entrance, passing blue-painted retaining walls

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car driving past on the multi-lane road

entered.detail: tall concrete retaining wall with blue painted lower section and weathered upper section
tall concrete retaining wall with blue painted lower section
concrete overpass structure spanning the road with large billboards mounted on top
large advertisement billboard displaying 'DINGLE' brand with futuristic graphics
futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings visible in the distant background
wide concrete sidewalk with large square tile pattern and drainage grates

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunny day walking along a wide urban sidewalk flanked by tall concrete walls. The camera approaches a large overpass structure adorned with billboards, with a futuristic city skyline visible in the distance. Vehicles occasionally pass by on the multi-lane road to the right as the camera moves steadily forward toward a dark tunnel entrance.

events.description: moving from bright outdoor sunlight into the covered tunnel entrance
ambient light drops significantly as entering the shadow of the concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass structure into the tunnel entrance, transitioning from outdoor to indoor environment

entered.detail: dark tunnel entrance with red warning lights above and concrete arch structure
large circular metal ventilation duct mounted on the left wall
long fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the tunnel ceiling
section of wooden paneling on the left wall with vertical slats

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the overpass into the tunnel entrance, experiencing a dramatic shift from bright sunlight to shadow. Red warning lights mark the tunnel portal above, while large ventilation ducts and fluorescent fixtures become visible on the interior walls and ceiling. The outdoor cityscape and billboards disappear from view as the enclosed space envelops the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: long concrete underpass tunnel with vehicle traffic

events.description: vehicle with bright headlights passes through the tunnel in the opposite direction
second vehicle passes by inside the tunnel

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dimly lit tunnel corridor, passing under continuous fluorescent lighting

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on driving through the tunnel toward the camera

entered.detail: series of concrete support pillars lining the right side of the tunnel
painted yellow line marking the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Deep inside the tunnel, the scene is illuminated solely by overhead fluorescent lights casting a cool glow on the concrete surfaces. The camera continues walking along the sidewalk marked by a yellow line, passing large ventilation ducts on the left and support pillars on the right. Occasional vehicles pass through the tunnel, their headlights cutting through the dim environment as the corridor stretches ahead toward a distant blue light at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a bright, sun-drenched urban thoroughfare into the oppressive shadow of a concrete underpass. It begins on a wide sidewalk flanked by tall walls, moving past futuristic billboards and a distant city skyline while vehicles glide along a multi-lane road. As the camera passes beneath the overpass, the scene shifts dramatically from brilliant daylight to deep shadow, with red warning lights marking the portal as the outdoor cityscape vanishes. The environment then transitions into a dimly lit interior where cool fluorescent fixtures and large ventilation ducts replace the sun, casting a sterile glow over the concrete surfaces. Finally, the camera continues along a yellow-marked path past support pillars, with passing headlights cutting through the gloom toward a distant blue light at the tunnel's end.
